title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.325 - Missouri Fallen Soldiers Memorial Bridge designated on U.S. Highway 65 in Greene County
text:
227.325.  Missouri Fallen Soldiers Memorial Bridge designated on U.S. Highway 65 in Greene County. — The bridge on U.S. Highway 65 over CST Overlook Avenue in Greene County shall be designated the "Missouri Fallen Soldiers Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs for such designation to be paid for by private donations.
(L. 2013 H.B. 303 & 304)
